title: SOS Announce Message
description: Emitted by an agent when it registers on the SOS bus at startup. Carries the agent's initial self-description. Published to sos:stream:global or sos:stream:sos:channel:global.

type.description: Discriminator constant that identifies this as an announce message.

source.description: Bus identity of the agent emitting this message. Must be prefixed with 'agent:' and use lowercase alphanumeric/dash names.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC datetime at which this message was emitted.

version.description: SemVer of the agent software publishing this announce (major.minor or major.minor.patch).

message_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this message instance. Used for deduplication and tracing.

trace_id.description: W3C Trace Context trace-id (32 hex chars). Optional; minted at ingress when absent.

target.description: Destination address on the bus. Defaults to the global channel when omitted.

payload.description: Optional runtime context snapshot captured at startup.

text.description: Human-readable startup message or greeting from the agent.

tool.description: Runtime toolchain the agent is executing inside (e.g. claude-code, codex, sdk).

pid.description: Operating system process id of the agent runtime at startup.

tty.description: TTY or pseudo-terminal device path attached to the agent process, if any.

cwd.description: Absolute working directory path of the agent process at startup.

agent_card_ref.description: URL or opaque reference pointing to the agent's full Agent Card record (sos:registry:{name} key or HTTP URL).
